svg.title: Diagram 0 — The complete basics of AI
svg.desc: Five sections: definition and cognitive loop, AI revolution timeline, capability tiers with AGI explained, real-world applications referencing the companion diagram, and the AI pipeline with explicit feedback loop.
svg.text: Start here — foundational concepts before going deeper
What is AI — the definition and what it does at a fundamental level

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What is the definition of artificial intelligence?')
g.text: The simulation of human intelligence by machines
tasks previously only humans could do.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does perceive mean in the AI cognitive loop?')
sendPrompt('How does AI learn from data?')
sendPrompt('How does AI reason and make sense of information?')
sendPrompt('How does AI decide what to do next?')
sendPrompt('How does AI act on its decisions?')

svg.text: The AI revolution — key milestones from 1950 to today

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What was the Turing Test and why did it matter?')
sendPrompt('What were expert systems in AI in the 1980s?')
sendPrompt('What was the AlexNet deep learning breakthrough in 2012?')
sendPrompt('What was the transformer architecture paper in 2017?')
sendPrompt('What was GPT-3 and why was it a breakthrough moment?')
sendPrompt('Why was the ChatGPT moment in 2022 a turning point for AI adoption?')

svg.text: AI capability tiers — where we are and where the field is heading

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What is narrow AI and what are real examples?')
sendPrompt('Where do frontier LLMs like Claude and GPT-4 sit on the capability spectrum?')
g.text: Today's best models — the grey zone

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What exactly is AGI — artificial general intelligence — and why does it matter?')
sendPrompt('What is superintelligent AI and why does it raise safety concerns?')

svg.text: Products span narrow AI through to frontier LLMs — not all are equal.
See the companion diagram for a full breakdown by capability tier with named products and use cases.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What are examples of narrow AI products used today?')
sendPrompt('What AI products sit between narrow AI and frontier LLMs?')
sendPrompt('What are examples of frontier LLM products used today?')

svg.text: The AI pipeline — how every AI system works end to end

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What kinds of data are used to train AI models?')
sendPrompt('What does data processing involve in AI pipelines?')
sendPrompt('What happens during model training in AI?')
sendPrompt('What is inference in AI and how does it differ from training?')
sendPrompt('What kinds of outputs do AI systems produce?')

svg.text: Feedback loop — the engine of continuous improvement
Outputs feed back as new training data. User interactions reveal failures. Models are retrained, fine-tuned,
and realigned. This loop is why AI systems get better over time — and why data quality compounds in value.
